testcase.name: submitRenewalNPBR
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()? Build info: version: '4.1.0', revision: '87802e897b' System info: host: 'APANGA-XEN', ip: '172.16.224.207', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '16.0.1' Driver pageLoadStrategy: normal, platform: WINDOWS, platformName: WINDOWS, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62512/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 97.0.4692.71, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true,
